/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/elf2uf2.dir/elf2uf2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/elf2uf2.dir/boot_blocks/block.cpp.o CMakeFiles/elf2uf2.dir/boot_blocks/item_base.cpp.o CMakeFiles/elf2uf2.dir/boot_blocks/item_image_def.cpp.o CMakeFiles/elf2uf2.dir/boot_blocks/item_load_map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/elf2uf2.dir/boot_blocks/item_version.cpp.o CMakeFiles/elf2uf2.dir/crc32/crc32.cpp.o CMakeFiles/elf2uf2.dir/uf2/uf2_ofstream.cpp.o -o elf2uf2
